name: Gorillaz
bio: Gorillaz fused pop, hip-hop, and animation-world branding into a catalog with unusually strong streaming durability and cross-generational replay value.
notable_for: Hybrid pop catalog, global streaming strength, and long-lived visual brand identity.
career_highlight: Feel Good Inc. and Clint Eastwood remain globally recognized crossover songs with strong playlist longevity.
revenue_drivers: Streaming remains strong because the catalog crosses multiple genres and listener cohorts.
The visual identity keeps older songs culturally reusable.
Collaborative songwriting and broad sync appeal help long-tail catalog economics.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Gorillaz's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Gorillaz's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
